_provenance: operator-authored anti-inflation control for the examples/turntax/ walkthrough. A CLEAN happy path: every call is a first-occurrence allow+engine round-trip — no alias, no duplicate, no poison, no destructive deny. The kernel saves NOTHING here, so turns_saved MUST be 0. This proves the turn-tax headline reflects real avoided errors, not a fixed discount applied to every call.

calls.note: the write -> allow+engine (the goal, on both arms)
